name: Underworld Tyranny
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as Evil this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = Evil time this Reincarnation

name: Honor Among Killers
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on assistants owned.

name: Shadow Advance
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.

name: Mana Addicts
effect: Mana Regeneration increases over time this Era.
formula: +(3 + 0.3 * x^0.7), where x = time this Era

name: Blood Sacrifices
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Dark Temples built this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.95)%, where x = highest Dark Temples this Reincarnation

name: Blackmail
effect: Reduce Royal Exchange cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.08).

name: Spider Gods
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on buildings owned.

name: Professional Assassins
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on Royal Exchanges made.
formula: (5 * x^0.5)%, where x = Royal Exchanges made

name: Blade Dance
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Combo Strike counter this Era.
formula: (60 + 60 * x^0.6)%, where x = Combo Strike counter this Era

name: Spider Clerics
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus additively based on highest Brothels built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(4 * x^0.8)%, where x = highest Brothels this Reincarnation

name: Ancillae Obscurae
effect: Increase Non-Unique building production based on Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (50 * x^0.5)%, where x = Unique Buildings owned

name: Crystal Servants
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Gems owned.
